calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Set For Trial On Aug-18-21 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Continued To Aug-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-18-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jarryk Oseguera, Plaintiff/Respondent; Gregory Lewis, Esq. for Defendant/Appellant UCSF

All parties are placed under oath.
Mr. Osegura offers the following Exhibits:

A: Photo of Receipt for custody of necklace by UCSF
B: Screen Print - Text messages
C: Appraisal of Necklace

Mr. Lewis concedes, for purposes of this haring, that the hospital took possession of the subject necklace and that the same was not returned. Mr. Lewis refers the Court to Cal. Civil Code Sec. 1859 for limitations on the hospital's liability and presents a brief on the issue.

Mr. Osegura responds.

After discussion, the Court instructs the parties to exit the courtroom and attempt to settle the matter in light of the issues presented by the Court.

Court in session.

Mr. Lewis directs the Court to Exhibit 5 to Defendant/Appellant's brief regarding the limits to liability upon admitance to the hospital.

At the Court's direction, Mr.Lewis again exits the Courtroom to contact his client.

Court in session.

Mr.Lewis and Mr. Osegura report a settlement. The Court is to prepare the settlement agreement.

The Court takes the matter under submission.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Judgment Entered
